name: EVO — Análise de Foto p/ Avatar (IA Vision)

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'claude-sonnet-5', max_tokens: 300, messages: [{ role: 'user', content: [{ type: 'image', source: { type: 'base64', media_type: $json.mediaType, data: $json.data } }, { type: 'text', text: $json.prompt }] }] }) }}
